title: MPtrj broad-DFT MLIP kart race: baseline vs Distill Accuracy vs Distill Accuracy + Accelerate
objective: Collect sealed evidence across multiple MLIPs showing the baseline function, the active Distill Accuracy lane, and the guarded Accuracy + Accelerate lane on the same fixture, checkpoint, and row scoring contract.

checkpoint_contract.pairing_rule: baseline, Distill Accuracy, and Distill Accuracy + Accelerate for the same row and MLIP must share one checkpoint URL

promotion_canary.reason: The canary is the kart race start line: two sensitive rows across the reliable cloud MLIPs, with all three lanes sharing checkpoints before the full grid fans out.

mlips.blocked_reason: Hold until the GCP MatGL/DGL image passes a fresh import canary on this runner tag.
FAIR Chemistry UMA access is gated until the account is authorized for the model repository.

ready_to_launch: support manifest is present locally and has a GCS target
every enabled MLIP maps to an allowlisted Cloud Run target job
every Distill lane resolves a concrete policy file and GCS policy URL
all Distill cells depend on the paired baseline checkpoint
ready_to_claim_accuracy_gain: all completed Distill cells reference the paired baseline checkpoint URL
all completed Distill cells include support_manifest_hash, distill_policy_hash, interventions, refusals, and theorem_hooks
row-level accuracy deltas are computed from sealed fixture scores, not from Phoenix-only annotations
ready_to_claim_kart_win: Distill Accuracy improves the sealed score
Distill Accuracy + Accelerate preserves accuracy within 0.02 relative error of Distill Accuracy
Distill Accuracy + Accelerate improves speed by at least 1.10x against Distill Accuracy
